place_ring_part_on_machine_spindle.query: a worker places a ring-shaped part onto the central machine spindle

arrange_white_cord_by_hand.query: a worker arranges the white cord on the ring-shaped part with both hands

press_illuminated_control_switch.query: a worker presses the illuminated switch on the right control panel

reach_and_return_with_black_tweezers.query: a worker reaches to the right and returns holding black tweezers

position_black_tweezers_at_white_cord.query: a worker brings the black tweezers to the white cord on the ring part

tuck_white_cord_with_black_tweezers.query: a worker tucks the white cord with black tweezers

reach_toward_control_panel_top.query: a worker reaches the right hand toward the top of the control panel
